phases.name: Variable-text continuation threading (#3b)
phases.description: Fix the two-layer variable-text bug the Phase-3 spike found: (1) a pre-existing loose-end fall-through defect in the inline variable-text path, then (2) gather-lead variable-text threading that builds on the corrected loose-end. All inside Compiler/; no runtime change.

steps.name: Thread variable-text loose-end to the enclosing scope
criteria: continuationLowerer no longer hardcodes fallThrough:.end; it threads the enclosing loose-end target down to WeaveEmitter.lower.
WeaveEmitter.lower / lowerWithLabelPaths accept a fallThrough parameter and pass it to WeaveResolver.resolve (reusing WeaveResolver.FallThrough .gather/.end).
Choices that follow an inline variable-text line and then gather fall through to the enclosing gather, not to end.
The vt-inline-choices-gather AT passes (native==oracle) and its .disabled trait is removed.
steps.scenario_name: inline variable-text choices fall through to the trailing gather, matching the oracle
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: example-based Swift Testing oracle execution-equivalence (compileAndPlay) per CLAUDE.md (OOP; PBT N/A). Backtick function-name style MANDATORY; @Test("string") FORBIDDEN. SPIKE-VALIDATED (docs/feature/native-compiler-emission-alignment/feature-delta.md SPIKE section): this is layer 2 — a PRE-EXISTING latent bug. continuationLowerer (RuntimeObjectEmitter.swift ~line 743) calls WeaveEmitter.lower with hardcoded fallThrough:.end (WeaveEmitter.swift:90); plumb the enclosing loose-end target down lowerBody -> lowerVariableTextLine -> continuationLowerer -> WeaveEmitter.lower (add a fallThrough param; WeaveResolver.FallThrough already models .gather([String])/.end). RE-ENABLES vt-inline-choices-gather (the pure inline case, no gather-lead fold needed). Boundary: Compiler/ only; no Engine/ import (R1); no JSONSerialization (R5); no runtime/Decoder change.

steps.name: Fold gather-lead variable-text choices into the continuation
criteria: A gather whose lead line is variable-text {|...|} threads its nested choices as that line's continuation instead of orphaned siblings (no dead-end).
Threading is mode-independent: sequence, cycle {&...}, and once {!...} all thread identically.
The fix reuses the corrected loose-end fall-through from 01-01 (gather-lead with a trailing gather falls through correctly).
The 5 gather-lead ATs pass (native==oracle) and their .disabled traits are removed.
No regression in the existing variable-text / weave / gather corpus.
steps.scenario_name: gather-lead variable-text threads its nested choices then ends, matching the oracle
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: example-based Swift Testing oracle execution-equivalence (compileAndPlay) per CLAUDE.md (OOP; PBT N/A). Backtick function-name style MANDATORY; @Test("string") FORBIDDEN. SPIKE-VALIDATED Option A (parser fold, zero observed regression, 324/324 green on the probe): when a gather body leads with a variable-text/inline-conditional line, keep the gather's following choices in the FLAT body (set nested:nil) so the flat continuation path threads them; this builds on the 01-01 fallThrough plumbing so the threaded choices get the correct enclosing loose-end. Fold site: WeaveParser.parseGather (WeaveEmitter.swift ~line 387) or InkParser gather parsing. RE-ENABLES the 5 gather-lead ATs (vt-gather-lead-end, vt-gather-lead-gather, vt-gather-lead-empty-choice, vt-gather-lead-cycle-once, vt-gather-lead-single-choice). Do NOT re-enable the TheIntercept e2e (it also needs Phases 1/2 #4a/#4b). Boundary: Compiler/ only; no Engine/ import (R1); no JSONSerialization (R5); no runtime/Decoder change.

validation.reviewer: orchestrator (gates + AT-mapping check; derives from reviewed SPIKE + Accepted ADR-012 + distilled ATs)
validation.notes: des-roadmap validate + des-verify-integrity --roadmap-only both exit 0. All 6 distilled variable-text ATs mapped: 01-01 re-enables vt-inline-choices-gather (layer-2 inline); 01-02 re-enables the 5 gather-lead ATs (layer-1 fold building on 01-01). No step exceeds the 8-scenario sizing threshold; dependency order matches the spike's two-layer finding. Decomposition 2 steps / 3 distinct production files = 0.67.
